# Plotnode

> Plotnode is the digital twin platform for rural land. Drone photogrammetry import, auto-enriched parcel and well data, AI-assisted planning of structures, utilities, livestock, and crops on photorealistic 3D terrain. Built for off-grid homesteaders, ranchers, and the drone operators who serve them.

## What Plotnode Does

- **3D drone-mesh import**: Upload OBJ, PLY, glTF, or point clouds from DroneDeploy, Pix4D, OpenDroneMap, RealityCapture, or DJI Terra. Plotnode processes them into streaming 3D Tiles automatically.
- **Auto-enriched parcel data**: 155M+ U.S. parcels via Regrid. Cochise, Apache, and Mohave counties (Arizona) get deeper integration with county GIS, ADWR Wells 55 registry, tax-lien data, and zoning RAG.
- **Rural-specific asset library**: 200+ parametric and procedurally-generated 3D assets — pole barns, corrals with squeeze chutes, chicken coops, water tanks, septic systems, ground-mount solar arrays, fencing, livestock shelters.
- **AI co-pilot**: Crop suggestions ranked by USDA hardiness zone + NRCS soil + slope + elevation. Utility-routing optimizer for water/power/gas with trench volume estimates. "Auto-Homestead" generative layouts from natural-language goals.
- **Zoning compliance warnings**: Place a chicken coop within 50ft of an RU-4 boundary in Cochise County and Plotnode flags the setback violation before you submit for permit.
- **Physics simulation**: Solar shadow studies for any date and time of year. Water runoff visualization driven by DEM elevation data.
- **County-spec PDF exports**: Generate site plan visualizations matching county templates. Cochise RU-4 ALQ format ready at launch.
- **iOS native AR companion**: Walk your remote parcel without cell signal. Native iOS app pre-caches your 3D tileset before you leave WiFi, then renders ghosted structures in correct GPS positions through your iPhone camera using ARKit.
- **Off-grid calculators**: Free calculators for solar + battery sizing (load-driven, not roof-driven), water catchment volume, cistern sizing, septic perc estimator, driveway cut/fill, panel tilt for winter optimization, and off-grid cabin cost.

## Three Modes

- **Free** — General Plot mode. Search any U.S. parcel by address or APN. Photorealistic 3D terrain, parcel boundary overlay, basic asset library, view-only share links. No credit card required.
- **Pro ($19/mo or $199/yr)** — Drone mesh upload, full asset library, AI co-pilot, all data overlays, zoning warnings, physics simulation, county PDF exports, real-time collaboration, unlimited projects.
- **Operator White-Label ($99/mo founder tier, first 50 only)** — Branded subdomain (yourname.plotnode.io), client portal management, custom asset library and brand color theme, unlimited mesh processing, partner directory placement. Standard $149/mo and API Access $199/mo tiers post-launch.

## Who It's For

Off-grid homesteaders, ranchers, custom acreage builders, permaculture designers, preppers, small farmers, rural realtors, and drone operators who serve rural clients. Particularly tuned for arid Southwest use cases (Arizona, New Mexico, southern Utah, southern Colorado, eastern Nevada) where existing tools fail.

## Built Alongside Stronghold Precision Aerials

Plotnode is built and field-tested by the team at Stronghold Precision Aerials, a Part 107 drone mapping business serving southeast Arizona. Every Stronghold flight ships with a Plotnode interactive portal as the canonical proof-of-concept.

## Product Status

Pre-launch. Early access waitlist open at https://plotnode.io.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://plotnode.io): Product overview, three modes, features, and waitlist signup
